title: potentilla neglecta
intro: Potentilla neglecta, also known as False Rose or Silver Buffaloberry, is a perennial shrub native to North America, characterized by its white or pink flowers and silver-gray foliage. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which can help to soothe wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Potentilla neglecta include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared as a herbal remedy in various forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
